LT Events

14

The Venetian Chop House

Upscale essence of a steakhouse with a celebration of Italian cuisine that's delicious and memorable!

The Edison

Festive environment with delicious food and amazing beverages - and if you stay a bit later, they have nightly entertainment that is a lot of fun!

The Pub

The Pub at Pointe Orlando offers private dining areas to seat 15 to 200 guests! Many options are available to make your event memorable

Orlando Rehearsal Dinner Restaurants

Looking for the perfect restaurant to host your engagement celebration or rehearsal dinner? Here's a list to get you started on your search journey. Each restaurant can host at least 20 guests in a private or semi-private environment.

Derek Bradley

25

Clary's Cafe

Start your day at Clary's Cafe. It's a perfect Southern diner and breakfast spot. I used to come here every weekend in college and it's always my first stop when I visit Savannah. Get the biscuits and gravy.

SCAD Museum of Art

Walk over to the SCAD Museum of Art to see some amazing art and architecture. The building itself is super cool and this space exhibits some of the best of the best from contemporary artists like: Kehinde Wiley, Nick Cave, Ebony G. Patterson, and Carlos Garcia.

The Original Pinkie Masters

Get happy hour drinks at this dive bar where Jimmy Carter stood on top of the bar and announced he was running for president. Meet some weird locals. Have a great time. Don't forget to ask for your last drink “to-go”. You're in the to-go cup zone.

See all 25 recs

View List
48 Hours in Savannah, Georgia

If you only have 48 hours in Savannah, these are the things I would do, see, eat, and drink. Most of this itinerary is completely walkable, but there are some things you'll want to get a lyft or Uber to, like the cemetery. Go in early Fall or late Spring to avoid the humidity of the summer. Also note that a lot of things are closed on Sundays, so ideally this plan works best for a Friday-Saturday combo.

Shower Routine Essentials!!

If you've been in the market searching for the perfect body moisturizers, oils, perfumes, etc., these are hands down the best products that have been working for me the past few years. Taleesa Crawford

10

Lancaster Cupcake: Gourmet Cupcake Shop in Lancaster, PA

This cute cupcake shop is in the heart of Lancaster and is SO cute. They also won a Cupcake Wars for the quality of their cupcakes too! They aren't cheap but SO good and such a fun experience going.

Rey Azteca Mexican Restaurant Palmyra

This is an INCREDIBLE Mexican restaurant. My hubby and I always crave this place!

The Largest Amusement Park in PA | Hersheypark

Hershey Park is an absolute BLAST. My kids adore it here. It is fun for both young kids and adults. What I love most is that there are little kid rides all over the park and not just in one designated area. This makes it so easy for adults to trade off going on big rides while the other adults keep the kids entertained and swapping. I just feel whoever designed this was a genius. HIGHLY recommend!

Sensō-ji

DisneySea Park tickets

Easily get here via a direct bus from Shinjuku. Make sure to get there 30 min. - 1 hour before they open, as they'll start letting people in at 8:45AM. Once you're in, get priority passes to 3 popular rides in the Disney app

14

Sweetwater Creek State Park, Lithia Springs

Beautiful lake to sit by or walk their trail down to the old mill. Just outside of Atlanta, going i-20 west.

Silver Comet Trail

If you are not into an unpaved trail, this is perfect for you. Nature, but smooth & paved. It's in Cobb County, not too far outside of the perimeter.

Allatoona Lake

Beautiful mountains & peaceful lake. It's about 35 mins. Outside of Atlanta, and worth the drive.

Elizabeth Pepperdine

11

Tropical Isle

Best place on bourbon street for a hurricane drink as they put a shark in it and give a little show while they're making it with a whistle and everything!

Lafitte's Blacksmith Shop Bar

Another haunted building in Nola! Supposedly the ghost of a pirate still sits in the back of the bar creeping on woman. One of the oldest building left standing in America as it survived the original Nola fire being a black smith shop and on the outskirts of the city but also has a dark history as it used to be a place for pirates to hide out and drink and fight while they were in Nola.

Hotel Villa Convento

This was my favorite hotel to stay at in Nola. It's not too expensive either. It has a view of the French quarter if you stay in the top room too. The best part it is used to be a brothel and is supposedly still haunted by a madame!

15

How to Find Your Social Media Niche

I found my niche randomly. I started off trying to be serious about my catering company, but I lost interest. One day I made a mental health video, and the rest was history. What are you passionate about?

What are the best ways to update your video editing skills?

Video editing and getting yourself up to date on the ever changing social media platforms is important! There are several free resources to edit and to learn. You want your videos to be of quality, because the algorithm pushes out videos more when they have a higher quality.

Lemon8 - Lifestyle Community on the App Store

Lemon8 was created by the same people who invented tiktok. I've been on there for nearly a year; it's a relaxing place to make slow content. If you like Pinterest join, because to me it's Pinterest and Instagram's offspring.
